falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern anticipated a sustained rally from support; a break below 4,800 invalidates the structural low and suggests the pattern match was a false positive, not a genuine bottom formation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 implies elevated but contained fear; persistent VIX above 25 indicates panic escalation rather than blowoff capitulation, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal's assumption of near-term stabilization

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while S&P 500 simultaneously trades below 5,000
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination signals flight-to-safety recession pricing, not the growth-recovery bottom the pattern suggests; it proves macro conditions have deteriorated beyond the 2024 August analog's parameters

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
